center.name: Albertine Rift
center.summary: Albertine Rift是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括非洲绿阔嘴鸟、Monteiro's bushshrike、Rwenzori batis等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Angola and Cameroon, with a historical record from the Albertine Rift of eastern Democratic Republic of the Congo and a lost specimen from Kakamega Forest, Kenya.{{cite web |last1=Fry |first1=Hilary |last2=Sharpe |first2=Chris |editor1-last=del Hoyo |editor1-first=J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: This species is only known from the Albertine Rift in eastern Democratic Republic of the Congo, where it is found in montane forest between 2000 and 3300 m in elevation. Sight records of this species exist from Rwanda and Burundi, but these lack documentation and have yet to be confirmed

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Rwenzori batis occurs in the Albertine Rift from the Rwenzori Mountains in the north to Mount Kabobo in the south

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It occurs in tropical moist montane forest, and is endemic to the Albertine Rift Mountains of the Democratic Republic of Congo and Uganda
